components.name: Agent Runtime
components.description: Managed execution environment for running AI agents on GPU-powered infrastructure. Handles orchestration, scaling, and lifecycle management for deployed agents.

components.name: Inference
components.description: Serverless access to foundation models (e.g. Llama, Mistral, GPT) via OpenAI-compatible API.

components.name: ADK
components.description: (Agent Development Kit) Open-source toolkit for building, testing, and deploying AI agents locally or in the cloud via CLI and SDK integrations.

components.name: Knowledge Bases
components.description: RAG-powered document stores that give agents access to your data. Supports multiple data sources for accurate, context-aware responses.

components.name: Guardrails
components.description: Content safety layer that filters agent inputs and outputs. Enforces topic restrictions and behavioral boundaries to keep agents on-task and compliant.

components.name: Model Services
components.description: Hosts and serves foundation and embedding models for serverless and dedicated inference workloads across the Gradient AI Platform.

incidents.name: Block Storage Volume NYC1 and NYC3

incident_updates.body: Our Engineering team is investigating an issue with attaching volume to the droplets in the NYC1 and NYC3 regions. During this time you may experience an issue with attaching volume to the Droplet(s). We apologize for the inconvenience and will share an update once we have more information.
